frameworks.name: functional localizer approach
frameworks.one_line: category-selective ROIs (EBA, FFA, OFA, PPA) defined per-subject via functional contrasts

core_question: How reproducible are within-subject fMRI localizations of high-level category-specific visual areas across runs and sessions?
key_assumptions: category-selective regions can be defined per-subject by contrast-based localizers
peak voxel location and T-value are valid stability indices
manipulations: different functional runs within a session
key_findings: all six subjects showed significant bilateral activation in EBA, FFA, OFA, PPA
T-value stability was high within and between sessions
interpretations: high-level category-specific visual areas can be robustly localized within subjects across scanning sessions
